positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a cheerful badger wearing a tiny crown, surrounded by whimsical woodland elements. The composition should be central and balanced, featuring strong silhouettes of leafy branches, toadstools, and sparkling dew drops. The style must be vector art, with thick black outlines, vibrant but earthy color palette (deep emerald green, mustard yellow, forest blue, and cream white), and high contrast for maximum print visibility. The overall mood should be joyful and adventurous, suitable for a high-quality apparel print, viewed against a solid background.
negative: blur, text, watermark, logo, poor anatomy, extra limbs, blurry, noise, low resolution, artifacts, dirty, gradient, photorealism, sketch, monochrome
